---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for r3d
title: "[REQUEST] ..."
labels: request
assignees: Bigfoot71

---

Before submitting a feature request, please check if a similar idea already exists.

Feature requests should describe:
- the problem you are trying to solve
- the proposed solution
- why it would be useful for r3d users

---

## Problem / Motivation

Describe the problem or limitation you are facing.

Explain the use case clearly.

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or API you would like to see added.

If possible, include a rough idea of the API or usage.
Explain how you imagine the feature working.

## Alternative solutions

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

Example:

- implementing it manually in a custom shader
- modifying the engine locally
- using an existing r3d feature in a different way

## Example use case

Provide a concrete example where this feature would be useful.

Code examples are welcome.

---

## Additional context

Add any other context, references, or examples.

Useful things include:

- similar features in other engines/libraries
- links to documentation or research
- screenshots or diagrams
